name: Lemon Filling (for Blitz Torte, Etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, sugar, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Add water to the mixture; stir until smooth.
3. Place over moderate heat and stir constantly until thick and clear (approximately 7-8 minutes).
4. Remove from heat and beat egg yolks.
5. Stir in a small amount of the hot mixture into the beaten yolks, then return everything to the saucepan.
6. Stir vigorously for an additional 2 minutes on low heat.
7. Blend in the lemon rind and butter, then add the lemon juice.
8. Allow the filling to cool completely before using or storing.
